channel.title: About on Alberto Fernández-de-Marcos
channel.description: Recent content in About on Alberto Fernández-de-Marcos

item.title: Contact
item.description: For any research-related discussion, feel free to contact me via albertfe@est-econ.uc3m.es

item.title: Research
item.description: Research Interest My research is focused on directional statistics, a field of statistics where data supports are different than the Euclidean, in particular the hypersphere $$ \mathbb{S}^q:=\{\mathbf{x}\in \mathbb{R}^{p}:\|\mathbf{x}\|= 1\}.$$ My PhD research, advised by Eduardo García-Portugués, aims to develop one- and two-samples tests of uniformity on the hypersphere. Publications Preprints Fernández-de-Marcos, A., and García-Portugués, E. (2021). Data-driven stabilizations of goodness-of-fit tests. arXiv:2112.01808. [pdf] Undergraduate Rodríguez-Sanz, A., Fernández-de-Marcos, A., Pérez-Castán, J., Gómez Comendador, F.

item.title: Resume
item.description: My probably outdated CV. Work Year Position Company 2021- Secondary Ed. Teacher Colegio Nazaret Oporto (Madrid) 2019-2020 Data Scientist Boston Consulting Group (GAMMA) 2018-2019 Data Scientist Kernel Analytics 2017-2018 Data Scientist cubenube Education Year Qualification Studies University 2021- PhD Mathematical Engineering Carlos III University of Madrid 2020-2021 MSc Math Secondary Education Teaching Rey Juan Carlos University 2018-2021 MSc Statistics for Data Science Carlos III University of Madrid 2013-2018 BSc Aerospace Engineering Polytechnic University of Madrid
